# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch_yml:
  cluster:
    name: elasticsearch_cluster
    
  node:
    master: true
    data: false
    ingest: true
  
  discovery.seed_hosts: ["es01", "es02"]
  cluster.initial_master_nodes: ["es01", "es02"]
  
  bootstrap.memory_lock: true
  
  xpack:
    monitoring:
      enabled: true
      
snapshot_repository_s3:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: my-bucket
    region: us-west-1
    
  # Configure your AWS credentials here, ensure they have appropriate permissions to read/write on the S3 bucket.
  credentials:
    id: YOUR_AWS_ACCESS_KEY
    secret: YOUR_AWS_SECRET_KEY
  
snapshot_repository_fileshare:
  type: filesystem
  settings:
    location: /my/share/location
    
# Configure Snapshot Lifecycle Policies. For example, to keep only the last 30 snapshots.
# snapshot_lifecycle:
#   - schedule: "5 0 * * *"
#     retention:
#       max_age: 7d
#     name: delete_old_snapshot
